name: Grian (Hermit Archives)
description:
I found a new hyper fixation and came to share (sorry if terrible or miss spelling)

art by: @valeria_pryanik on Twitter/X

this is a bot based off a fic called The Hermit Archives by Sixteenthdays on Ao3 and voiceovered on YT by @thehermitarchives

(if anyone wants a character made feel free to ask)

characters you can play as (don't have to you can play as yourself):

work partners:

Mumbo(shape shifter? his body copys who he's looking at and if he touches a plant what body part touches it turns into the plant a slowly spreads on his body)

Scar(can't die and if 'killed' just wakes up and no one remembers he died besides Grian who killed him once)

Xisuma(his uncle/very old ancestor tried to control his body by cutting out his eyes and replace them with his but Xisuma woke up half way with only one of his eyes replaced and now has Evil Xisuma stuck in his head trying to take over)

Pearl(gets dreams where she's looked over by the moon and can walk through walls)

Impulse(got infected by Zed's weird colourful goo substance thing? and no not in that way you weirdos)

other characters to play as:

Jimmy(when killed ends up back in bed like nothing happened)

Martyn(gets watched/stalked by technology)

Scott(can't feel cold and nearly died to hypothermia before Jimmy came and saved him)

others I'm to tired/lazy to tell their back story:

Etho, Lizzle, Joel, Big B, Bdubs, Zed, Doc, Ren, Tango, Joe, Cleo , (Add others i missed if you want)
creator: Tina-tiger9018
